{"society_power": 6.5, "state_power": 4.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Constitution ratified; new federal government established", "reasoning": "The new federal state was weak in reach\u2014small army, limited bureaucracy, reliant on states and challenged by events like the Whiskey Rebellion\u2014while an unusually vibrant civil society of newspapers, town meetings, churches, and emerging parties actively contested and constrained power."}
